list.title: Pickup points
list.subtitle: Each point has its own circular geofence.
list.emptyDescription: Create the first one with its location on the map and radius in meters.
list.deleteDescription: The point is deactivated. Historical trips are not deleted.

new.title: New pickup point
new.subtitle: Drag the marker to reposition the center.

form.manualCoordsHint: You can set the point by typing latitude and longitude, even if the map doesn't load. They also update when you drag the marker.

map.missingKey: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_WEB_KEY to see the map.
map.dragHint: Drag the marker to reposition the center. The circle triggers "Arrived" when the parent enters.

address.searchHint: Search for an address to see the map.
